chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO 1st. Cr. Bail Appln. No. D- 31 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection-A. 2. For hearing of bail application. 08.07.2025. Miss Ghulam Khadija Bhatti, advocate for the Applicant. Mr. Nazir Ahmed Bhangwar, DPG for the State. ------------ At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that she would not press the disposal of instant bail application before this Court on merits, if, learned trail court is directed to dispose of the very case within two months. Order accordingly. If, learned trial court fails to conclude the trial within stipulated period, the applicant shall be at liberty to file afresh bail application before the learned trial court which will be decided strictly in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E S.Ashfaq
